mission.title: buildpacks: Docker API Version 1.44
mission.description: Docker API Version 1.44. Requested by 7+ users.

steps.title: Check current buildpacks setup
steps.description:
Verify your buildpacks version and configuration:
```bash
pack version
```
This feature requires a working buildpacks installation.

steps.title: Review buildpacks configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant buildpacks configuration:
Docker Engine latest version requires a minimum API version of 1.44. Several CI/CD pipelines seem to be affected in the last week.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Docker API Version 1.44
steps.description:
## Summary
This bumps the Docker API version from `1.38` to `1.44`. This API version was introduced in Docker Engine is now `25`.

## Output
None

#### Before

#### After

## Documentation
Do we document the Docker API version anywhere?

- Should this change be documented?

## Related

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Upgrade buildpacks to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade buildpacks:
```bash
# Check current version
pack version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/buildpacks/pack
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Docker API Version 1.44" is functioning correctly.
